evidenceBasis: Generated from the production mobile-web handoff helper. These rows describe current code-path behavior and the QA expectation each browser context should verify.

contexts.label: Android Chrome
contexts.evidenceLabel: system browser / app-first intent or scheme path

contexts.label: Instagram in-app browser (iOS)
contexts.evidenceLabel: representative in-app browser / external-app jump may be suppressed

serviceNotes.summary: Android Chrome and iOS Safari both attempt app-first for canonical and search links. Search mode uses spotify:search on app-open and open.spotify.com/search as the same-service web fallback.
Android Chrome attempts app-first with an Android intent for canonical and search links. iOS contexts have no app-aware YouTube Music path in the current web implementation, so they remain web-only.

Android Chrome uses Android intent app-open for both watch URLs and search URLs. iOS Safari uses the YouTube custom scheme; in-app browsers should be treated as best-effort for external-app jump and must preserve the same-service web fallback.

rows.observedBehavior: Attempts Spotify app URI first. If the external app opens, Chrome backgrounds; if Chrome stays visible, the same-service web URL loads after about 900ms.
rows.qaExpectation: app-first is expected; same-service web fallback must still be reachable
rows.notes: Chrome should preserve the same-service web fallback even when the app target does not open.

rows.observedBehavior: Stays in Chrome and loads the same-service web URL after about 900ms when the external target does not open.
rows.qaExpectation: app-first is expected; same-service web fallback must still be reachable
rows.notes: Chrome should preserve the same-service web fallback even when the app target does not open.

rows.observedBehavior: Attempts Spotify app URI first. Safari may show an intermediate prompt; if the page stays visible, the same-service web URL loads after about 900ms.
rows.qaExpectation: app-first is best-effort; same-service web fallback must remain reachable
rows.notes: Safari custom-scheme behavior can vary by prompt timing; confirm the same-service web fallback still wins when the browser stays visible.

rows.observedBehavior: Safari remains visible and the same-service web URL loads after about 900ms if the custom-scheme jump is unavailable.
rows.qaExpectation: app-first is best-effort; same-service web fallback must remain reachable
rows.notes: Safari custom-scheme behavior can vary by prompt timing; confirm the same-service web fallback still wins when the browser stays visible.

rows.observedBehavior: Opens the canonical youtube_music web URL immediately. Installed state does not change behavior for this service/context.
rows.qaExpectation: web-only path should be treated as guaranteed for this browser context
rows.notes: Current web implementation has no iOS app-aware YouTube Music path, so this remains web-only even when the app is installed.

rows.observedBehavior: Opens the canonical youtube_music web URL immediately because no app-aware path exists here.
rows.qaExpectation: web-only path should be treated as guaranteed for this browser context
rows.notes: Current web implementation has no iOS app-aware YouTube Music path, so this remains web-only even when the app is installed.

rows.observedBehavior: Attempts Spotify app URI first inside the container. If the container keeps focus or suppresses the external-app jump, the same-service web URL loads after about 900ms.
rows.qaExpectation: best-effort app-open only; web fallback must remain available
rows.notes: Use this row as the representative in-app browser scenario. External-app jump behavior can vary by container policy, so treat app-open as best-effort.

rows.observedBehavior: No installed app target can be taken, so the in-app browser stays visible and the same-service web URL loads after about 900ms.
rows.qaExpectation: best-effort app-open only; web fallback must remain available
rows.notes: Use this row as the representative in-app browser scenario. External-app jump behavior can vary by container policy, so treat app-open as best-effort.
